name: Lorenzo Mancini
learned: Lorenzo Mancini is an engineer at OPBG specializing in model optimization for federated learning in clinical settings. He focuses on making FL models efficient enough to run on hospital infrastructure while maintaining accuracy for pediatric diagnostics.
currently: Lorenzo is optimizing the federated model architecture to reduce communication overhead and improve convergence on heterogeneous medical data.
lifestyle: Lorenzo arrives at 9am, reviews overnight training metrics, optimizes model hyperparameters, and coordinates with Matteo on training pipelines.
daily_plan_req: 1. arrive at lab at 9am, 2. review training metrics, 3. optimize model architecture, 4. lunch at 12:30pm, 5. run benchmark experiments, 6. document optimization results at 5pm
